__comment: Dashboard-as-code for the bacnet_device measurement written by the Device Health Service. Provisioned into Grafana by the Observability Pack supervisor. Referenced by the building-devices manifest's `dashboards` field.
title: BACnet — Device Health

targets.query:
from(bucket: "utilities")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bacnet_device" and r._field == "online")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "utilities")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bacnet_device" and r._field == "online")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.device, set: ${device:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min)
  |> group(columns: ["device", "name"])

from(bucket: "utilities")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bacnet_device" and r._field == "rtt_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.device, set: ${device:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["device", "name"])
